title: Axebot
move_pattern: Normally starts with a random cycle between The One-Two (weighted), Sharpen (cannot repeat consecutively), and Hammer Uppercut (weighted). When respawned via Stock, starts with Boot Up then enters the random cycle.
notes: Axebot has 2 Stock charges by default (tracked by StockPower). It can respawn — when it does, it starts its move sequence with Boot Up (gaining Block and Strength) before returning to the random cycle of attacks.
